actions.name: 客户编号_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 客户编号_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT khsheet3.kh_id,khsheet3.company_name 
FROM khsheet3 
WHERE ((khsheet3.ywry=:_user_username_) 
  OR (khsheet3.zjl=:_user_username_) 
  OR (khsheet3.wxzj=:_user_username_)) 
  AND (khsheet3.module1="客户资料")

actions.name: 事_客户编号
actions.caption: 事_客户编号
actions.expression:
SELECT kh.sid,kh.khlx 
FROM kh 
WHERE (kh.kh_id=[业务询价.客户编号]) 
ORDER BY kh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 询价货号_ButtonEdit
actions.caption: 询价货号_ButtonEdit

fields.caption: 询价货号
fields.output: 业务询价.产品资料.询价货号

actions.expression:
SELECT bjsheet.sid,
       bj.bj_id,
       bj.ywry,
       bj.bjbz,
       bjsheet.mbjg,
       bjsheet.cgdj,
       bjsheet.sccj1,
       bjsheet.fljg,
       bjsheet.xjhh,
       bjsheet.zwpm,
       bjsheet.cpgg,
       bjsheet.nhrl,
       bjsheet.nhwx,
       bjsheet.wxrl,
       bjsheet.zhwbzh,
       bjsheet.cszl,
       bjsheet.jhts,
       bjsheet.bz,
       bjsheet.yse,
       bjsheet.ks,
       bjsheet.jsfs,
       bjsheet.cz,
       bjsheet.dw,
       bjsheet.cpfl,
       bjsheet.yjfl,
       bjsheet.ejfl,
       bjsheet.flmc,
       bjsheet.cpsm,
       bjsheet.cply1
FROM bj,bjsheet 
WHERE (bj.rid=bjsheet.pid) 
  AND (ifnull(bj.bjsp,"")<>"")
  and bjsheet.xjhh=[业务询价.产品资料.询价货号]
  AND (ifnull(bjsheet.xjhh,"")<>"") 
ORDER BY bjsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 事_产品资料_中文包装
actions.caption: 事_产品资料_中文包装

fields.caption: 英文包装
fields.output: 业务询价.产品资料.英文包装

actions.expression:
SELECT bzhfsh.sid,bzhfsh.ywbzh 
FROM bzhfsh 
WHERE (bzhfsh.zhwbzh=[业务询价.产品资料.中文包装]) 
ORDER BY bzhfsh.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 对应采购报价
actions.caption: 对应采购报价
actions.expression:
SELECT cgbj.rid
FROM cgbj
WHERE (cgbj.bj_id=[业务询价.询价采购.报价单号]) 
ORDER BY cgbj.rid ASC

actions.name: 内盒装箱量
actions.caption: 内盒装箱量
actions.expression: [业务询价.产品资料.外箱装箱量]/[业务询价.产品资料.内盒/外箱]
actions.output: 业务询价.产品资料.内盒装箱量

actions.caption: 引采购人员
actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.sid,
       ywrybiao.yhm,
       ywrybiao.bmjl,
       ywrybiao.sybzj,
       ywrybiao.bm,
       ywrybiao.ssdq
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%") 
  AND (ywrybiao.zt<>"离职") and ([业务询价.业务人员]=:_user_username_ or ([业务询价.业务人员]<>:_user_username_ 
  and ((ywrybiao.bmjl=:_user_username_) or (ywrybiao.sybzj=:_user_username_) or (ywrybiao.sybdzj=:_user_username_))) or permission('业务人员'))
ORDER BY ywrybiao.bm,ywrybiao.ssdq ASC

actions.caption: 事_询价采购_报价人员
actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.sid,ywrybiao.bmjl,ywrybiao.sybzj,ywrybiao.sybdzj 
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[业务询价.询价采购.报价人员]) 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.sid DESC LIMIT 1

FROM bzyq

SELECT zycpfenglb.cpfl
FROM zycpfenglb
group by zycpfenglb.cpfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.yjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[业务询价.产品资料.产品大类]) group by zycpfenglb.yjfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.ejfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[业务询价.产品资料.产品大类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[业务询价.产品资料.一级分类])  group by zycpfenglb.ejfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.sjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[业务询价.产品资料.产品大类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[业务询价.产品资料.一级分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.ejfl=[业务询价.产品资料.二级分类]) group by zycpfenglb.sjfl

FROM cply

业务询盘

select distinct yhm from (SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%") and  (zt<>"离职") and :_user_username_ = [业务询价.业务人员]
union
SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%") and ((ywrybiao.bmjl=:_user_username_) or (ywrybiao.sybzj=:_user_username_) or (ywrybiao.sybdzj=:_user_username_)) 
  and  (zt<>"离职") and :_user_username_ <> [业务询价.业务人员]) a

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%采购%") and ((ywrybiao.bmjl=:_user_username_) or (ywrybiao.sybzj=:_user_username_) or (ywrybiao.sybdzj=:_user_username_)) and  (zt<>"离职")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC
